pages.about_text:
ABOUT US
how it all started
Many may remember occasions when he stayed open late to wait for you to come from the doctor’s office or to personally deliver a prescription to your home in bad weather. Some may remember him coming in on a holiday or in the middle of the night to fill an emergency prescription. Others may simply recall the time he spent reassuring and advising you on a medical or personal concern. the Owner the Owner blessed to have opened a business in the North Arlington community. He developed personal relationships with many that more closely resembled family ties than business patrons. The traditions of superlative care, products and services , instilled by the Owner the Owner Pharmacy 01’s inception, are the same traditions to which our customers are accustomed to today.
In January of 1964, Northarlington Pharmacy 01 opened under the leadership of the Owner. the Owner the Owner just around the corner and always there to help.
our growth over the years
Northarlington Pharmacy 01 has seen many changes since 1964. The original pharmacy, HB Drugs, was located at 155 Ridge Road. the Owner’s son the Owner, a graduate of Rutgers School of Pharmacy, took over leadership of the store in 1992. Guided by the traditions of service and care instilled in him by his father, the Owner the Owner Northarlington Pharmacy 01 into what it is today. He expanded the store in the mid-1990’s and forged a new path in 1999 as HB Drugs returned to its pharmacy roots by opening prescription compounding lab. In January 2001, the store moved to 100 Main St, providing a larger facility, expanded compounding laboratory, and a parking lot. It was also at this time that HB Drugs assumed its current name of Northarlington Pharmacy 01 and its subsidiary, HB Apothecary.
award winning pharmacy
In 2024, Northarlington Pharmacy 01 once again earned recognition on both a local and national level by winning the Good Neighbor Pharmacy of the Year Award. This is the second time Northarlington Pharmacy 01 has received this award, the first time back in 2016. These awards were created to recognize independent pharmacies, with over 5,000 pharmacies in contention. In 2016, we earned a Proclamation and key to the town of North Arlington to thank us for our service to the community, plus an award from the State of New Jersey for our service to the wider community. In 2017, the Owner the Owner Independent Pharmacist of the Year for the state of NJ.
3rd generation family business
Also in 2016, the Owner’s grandson and the Owner’s son, Vincent the Owner, the Owner HB family, making the pharmacy a 3rd generation family business. the Owner the Owner Academy of Sports Medicine Certified Personal Trainer and Weight Loss Specialist, plus a Precision Nutrition Level 1 certified coach for Exercise Nutrition. the Owner the Owner Owner’s Best® within the pharmacy. This allowed us to continue the Owner’s legacy of preventative and proactive care for our patients by adding nutrition, micronutrient and wheat zoomer testing , fitness, and natural products to the pharmacy. Through the website, we now help people from all around the United States.
Welcoming Our Newest Partner
James Park was a pharmacy extern from Rutgers at Northarlington Pharmacy 01 back in 2009. He became a full-time pharmacist here in 2010 and has been an integral part of our business and the community ever since. Today he is the Pharmacy Manager the Owner Functional Wellness Expert — and now we are proud to say he also a part-owner!
For over 50 years, Northarlington Pharmacy 01 and now the Owner’s Best® have carried on the traditions, service, and legacy of the Owner. We have been your friendly, family-owned and operated neighborhood pharmacy and have maintained our values and level of service as our neighborhood continues to grow.
We understand that, especially in today’s world of healthcare, trust is something that is earned. We thank you for placing your trust in us today and hope to continue to earn your trust in the future.
SPECIAL HOURS
PLEASE NOTE THAT Northarlington Pharmacy 01 WILL BE CLOSING THURSDAY, 4/9 AT 5:30PM FOR A PROVIDER ONLY LOW DOSE NALTREXONE EVENT. UPDATED APRIL 6, 2026 7:35AM
pages.homepage_text:
COMPOUNDING | FUNCTIONAL MEDICINE | CONSULTATIONS | HOME HEALTH CARE
Over 50 years of safely caring for you and your family
2024 Good Neighbor Pharmacy of the Year Winner!
DO YOU HAVE AUTO-IMMUNE ISSUES?
A Family You Can Trust
the Owner, the Owner Northarlington Pharmacy 01 in North Arlington, NJ in 1964. His son, the Owner, RPh, runs the pharmacy today along with his son, the Owner, NASM-CPT, WLS, Pn1.
In 2024, Northarlington Pharmacy 01 was again named the Good Neighbor Pharmacy of the Year. This is a national award for independent pharmacies with over 5,000 pharmacies in contention.
We accept all major insurance plans including PAAD, MEDICAID and MEDICARE PART D. We also accept most other plans including, but not limited to:
If you do not see your insurance listed, feel free to call us to confirm if we take your plan.
Continuing the Owner’s legacy
FUNCTIONAL PHARMACY
the Owner the Owner and genuine practitioner. Even as a pharmacist, he preached that our patients take as little medication as possible. To continue his legacy of proactive care, the Owner’s Best® was created. Like the Owner, the Owner brand is built on a foundation of trust and sincerity of purpose.
COMPOUNDING PHARMACY
Commercial medication not working? By working with your physician, we make custom medication individualized to your specific needs.
SUPERIOR SUPPLEMENTS
You trust your pharmacist with your medication. Why not trust us with your supplements? We offer our the Owner’s Best® products in store and online.
FITNESS & NUTRITION COACHING
Looking to lose weight or eat healthier? We offer 100% online, customizable programs for fitness, nutrition, and healthy liestyle building.
Popular local web blog, The Hoboken Girl featured Northarlington Pharmacy 01 in their article about the top area pharmacies. As they put it, we are one of those places that “have withheld the test of time…still offering personalized care in unique spaces.”
“Three generations of the the Owner the Owner run this pharmacy, which was established in 1964. It has seen expansion and renovation since the Owner the Owner it, including the addition of weight loss clinics, drug compounding facilities, and sports medicine practice. The expansions have served the pharmacy well, as it earned both local and national recognition by winning the 2016 Good Neighbor Pharmacy of the Year Award.”
We say thank you Hoboken Girl for noticing!
Vaccination is an important aspect in the prevention of spreading serious diseases. While many individuals can receive vaccinations, there is a population of people who are not able due to medical reasons. Because of this, getting vaccinated not only can protect you but also others who are unable. Northarlington Pharmacy 01 is a family-owned facility dedicated to educating patients through transparent and accessible services. Residents in Northern New Jersey can receive in-pharmacy vaccinations, including the COVID-19 and flu vaccines, and access other products and services at Northarlington Pharmacy 01.
NUTRITION ADVICE
Functional pharmacist and nutrition coaches on staff!
SUPPLEMENT SUPPORT
Wonder if what you’ve been taking actually works?
Orthomolecular Expertise
Through supplements and vitamins individually recommended based on your unique needs, our pharmacists can help you address health issues in a natural and lasting way. With orthomolecular supplements and vitamins, you can become more resilient against health issues and improve your quality of life.
Changing the lives of thousands of people just like you!
